description: Style NoteGlamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. A classic LBD with styling details to spurce up the entire look, this one is definitely one of the must haves. Pair it with high heeled black closed pump shoes and accesorise subtly for an elegant look. Product DetailsBlack dress with a decorative central lace up detail at the waist, has V neckline, short foldover sleeves, concealed zipper on the back and princess panel with top stitch along the front and back for better FitMaterial and Care69% viscose, 27% nylon and 4% spandexMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 8 which measures 87 cm from the shoulder to the hem
